_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: At baseline, 84% (16 of 19) of patients rated having tumor pain (total sample mean, 4.95; SD, 3.44; range, 0-10) with 69% (11 of 16) reporting moderate to severe levels (ratings ≥ 4).
details: At baseline, 84% (16 of 19) of patients rated having tumor pain with total sample mean of 4.95 (SD 3.44, range 0-10), with 69% (11 of 16) reporting moderate to severe levels (ratings ≥4)
